inputs.label: Present Value
inputs.businessContext: The current amount of money to be financed or invested.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current amount of money to be financed or invested.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Finanse edilecek veya yatırılacak mevcut para miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der aktuelle Geldbetrag, der finanziert oder investiert werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant actuel à financer ou à investir.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad actual de dinero a financiar o invertir.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الحالي المراد تمويله أو استثماره.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: The yearly interest rate as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: The yearly interest rate as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: La tasa de interés anual como porcentaje.

inputs.label: Number of Periods
inputs.businessContext: The total number of payment periods (typically years).

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of payment periods (typically years).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de périodes de paiement (généralement en années).
businessContext_i18n.es: El número total de períodos de pago (generalmente años).

inputs.label: Future Value
inputs.businessContext: The desired future value after the last payment; usually 0 for full repayment.

businessContext_i18n.en: The desired future value after the last payment; usually 0 for full repayment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Son ödemeden sonra istenen gelecek değer; genellikle tam geri ödeme için 0.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der gewünschte zukünftige Wert nach der letzten Zahlung; normalerweise 0 bei vollständiger Rückzahlung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur future souhaitée après le dernier paiement ; généralement 0 pour un remboursement complet.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor futuro deseado después del último pago; usualmente 0 para amortización total.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة المستقبلية المرغوبة بعد آخر دفعة؛ عادةً 0 للسداد الكامل.

inputs.label: Payment Type
inputs.businessContext: 0 for payments at the end of each period, 1 for payments at the beginning.

businessContext_i18n.en: 0 for payments at the end of each period, 1 for payments at the beginning.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0 dönem sonu ödemeleri, 1 dönem başı ödemeleri için.
businessContext_i18n.de: 0 für Zahlungen am Ende jeder Periode, 1 für Zahlungen am Anfang.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 pour les paiements en fin de période, 1 pour les paiements en début de période.
businessContext_i18n.es: 0 para pagos al final de cada período, 1 para pagos al inicio.
businessContext_i18n.ar: 0 للدفعات في نهاية كل فترة، 1 للدفعات في بدايتها.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
